input.system:
You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

samples.output: <think>A metal gas burner sits beneath a pot on a stove grate. Initially unlit, blue flames ignite around the perforated circular burner head. The fire spreads evenly, creating a ring of blue heat under the cookware, illuminating the surrounding metal components.</think><answer></answer>

[114-116] A woman in a yellow floral shirt lowers a white onion ring into a glass bowl of yellow batter, after which a gloved hand lifts the fully coated ring. [116-120] The hand transfers the dripping ring to a shallow metal pan filled with coarse white breadcrumbs and scoops the dry mixture over the wet surface. [120-126] The gloved hand presses the crumbs firmly to cover the yellow batter completely, then lifts the textured, white-coated ring from the pan.

The hand then transfers the fully coated onion ring to a clean, shallow metal tray, setting it down on the shiny silver surface next to other prepared rings. [130-132] A third breaded onion ring is placed onto the tray alongside two others, leaving three coated rings resting on the silver surface. [136-138] A woman in a yellow floral shirt completes coating an onion ring with breadcrumbs in a metal bowl and moves it to a silver tray. [148-152] A woman in a yellow floral top pours yellow vegetable oil from a small glass bowl into a metal pan on the stove. As the first ring fries, a second white, breaded ring is added to the bubbling oil beside it. Subsequently, a third breaded onion ring is submerged into the pan using the chopsticks. Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

compressed_segments.text: [0-2] A metal gas burner beneath a pot ignites, spreading blue flames around the perforated head. [2-6] In a pot of bubbling yellow oil, three breaded rings fry before wooden chopsticks lower a fourth white, breadcrumb-coated ring into the liquid. [6-8] Golden-brown, crispy fried rings are arranged on a white rectangular platter lined with a paper towel. [8-14] A woman with dark hair tied back, wearing a yellow floral blouse and silver necklace, stands before a white door and window blinds, speaking directly to the camera with varying facial expressions.

[14-16] A white rectangular plate displays a pile of golden-brown fried onion rings on a bamboo mat, positioned above two small square bowls containing red ketchup and pale yellow dipping sauce, with the text "ONION RINGS" in the upper left corner. [16-18] The text overlay changes to "RINGS" before the scene cuts to a woman in a yellow floral blouse standing behind a speckled countertop arranged with glass bowls of white powder, eggs, raw onion rings, and a container of yellow oil. [18-22] The woman speaks while resting her hands on the counter edge, then extends her left hand to gesture towards the bowl of yellow oil on the right side. [22-24] She points her right index finger at a large white onion, transitioning to a close-up of raw onion rings on a glass plate with the text "LARGE YELLOW OR WHITE ONIONS" centered over the vegetables and a bowl of breadcrumbs visible to the left.

[28-32] On a speckled countertop, a finger points to a small glass bowl of white powder labeled "BAKING POWDER", then moves to a bowl of white granules labeled "SALT". [32-36] The finger indicates a bowl with three white eggs labeled "EGGS", followed by a bowl of white liquid labeled "MILK". [36-38] The view changes to a close-up of a glass bowl containing pale yellow liquid labeled "VEGETABLE OIL", with raw onion rings visible in the background.

[38-40] A glass bowl containing liquid labeled "OIL" is shown before cutting to a woman in a yellow floral blouse standing behind a counter with ingredients and empty glass bowls, as the text "ONION RING BATTER" appears in the upper left. [40-44] The woman stands centrally with a large empty mixing bowl in front of her while the "ONION RING BATTER" text remains visible then vanishes, leaving her smiling at the camera with hands resting on the granite surface near small ingredient bowls. [44-46] The view shifts to a close-up overhead angle where a hand pours white powder from a small bowl into the large mixing bowl, accompanied by the text "ALL-PURPOSE FLOUR" on the right side next to the bowl on the speckled countertop.

recent_thinks: [24-26] A large glass bowl filled with coarse white flakes appears, overlaid with the text "PANKO BREAD CRUMBS" in black capital letters. To the right, raw white onion rings and a whole peeled onion sit on a clear plate, while a small bowl of white powder remains visible on the left edge.

[26-28] The scene shifts to a top-down view of multiple glass bowls containing eggs, milk, and white powders arranged on a counter. Text reading 'ALL-PURPOSE FLOUR' overlays a bowl of fine white powder while a finger points directly at it, identifying the ingredient within the preparation setup.

[46-48] A small glass bowl containing white powder is tipped over a large mixing bowl already holding flour. The powder falls onto the flour pile. White text reading "BAKING POWDER" appears on the right side of the screen next to the bowl on the speckled countertop.

[48-50] A small glass bowl tips over the large mixing bowl, pouring white granules onto the flour mixture. The text "SALT" appears in white capital letters on the right side. A metal whisk handle is visible on the left edge of the large bowl.

[50-52] A hand holds a metal whisk inside the large glass bowl, stirring the white flour mixture. The text "MIX TOGETHER" appears in white capital letters on the left side of the screen as the dry ingredients are combined on the speckled countertop.

[52-54] A hand continues whisking the white powder mixture in the large glass bowl with a metal whisk. The text "MIX TOGETHER" remains visible on the left side as the dry ingredients are blended on the speckled countertop surface.

[54-56] The hand continues to mix the dry ingredients with a metal whisk inside the large glass bowl. The text "MIX TOGETHER" remains on the left side of the screen while the white powder is stirred on the speckled countertop.

queries.question: What text overlay is displayed in the top left corner during the presentation of the finished fried onion rings? A. PANKO BREAD CRUMBS B. ALL-PURPOSE FLOUR C. ONION RINGS D. VEGETABLE OIL

answers.text: C

samples.output: <think>A pair of hands cracks a white egg over a separate clear glass bowl, releasing the yolk and white inside. White text overlay on the left reads "IN SEPARATE BOWL ADD EGGS" as the egg contents fall into the bowl on the speckled countertop.</think><answer></answer>

samples.output: <think>A metal whisk vigorously beats the eggs and milk inside a clear glass bowl. The bright yellow yolks break apart and blend with the white liquid, transforming the contents into a frothy, pale yellow fluid as the whisk moves rapidly in circular motions on the speckled countertop.</think><answer></answer>

[6-8] Golden-brown, crispy fried rings are arranged on a white rectangular platter lined with a paper towel. [8-14] A woman with dark hair tied back, wearing a yellow floral blouse and silver necklace, stands before a white door and window blinds, speaking directly to the camera with varying facial expressions. [14-16] A white rectangular plate displays a pile of golden-brown fried onion rings on a bamboo mat, positioned above two small square bowls containing red ketchup and pale yellow dipping sauce, with the text "ONION RINGS" in the upper left corner. [16-18] The text overlay changes to "RINGS" before the scene cuts to a woman in a yellow floral blouse standing behind a speckled countertop arranged with glass bowls of white powder, eggs, raw onion rings, and a container of yellow oil. [18-22] The woman speaks while resting her hands on the counter edge, then extends her left hand to gesture towards the bowl of yellow oil on the right

[58-60] A pair of hands holds the separated halves of a white eggshell over a clear glass bowl containing three bright yellow egg yolks and translucent egg white on a speckled countertop. The text "IN SEPARATE BOWL ADD EGGS" remains visible in white capital letters on the left. [60-62] A hand pours a white liquid from a small glass container into the bowl with the three yolks, accompanied by the text overlay "MILK" appearing on the left side. [62-66] A metal whisk is introduced to vigorously beat the eggs and milk inside the clear glass bowl. The bright yellow yolks break apart and blend with the white liquid, transforming the contents into a frothy, pale yellow fluid as the whisk moves rapidly in circular motions on the speckled countertop.

[46-50] A small glass bowl tips white powder labeled "BAKING POWDER" and white granules labeled "SALT" into a large mixing bowl holding flour on a speckled countertop, with a metal whisk handle visible nearby. [66-68] Inside a clear glass bowl, a metal whisk vigorously beats an egg and milk mixture, breaking bright yellow yolks to blend completely with white liquid into a smooth, frothy, pale yellow fluid. [68-72] A woman in a yellow floral top stands behind a granite countertop holding the small bowl of pale yellow liquid next to the large flour bowl; white text reading "ADD TO THE FLOUR MIXTURE" appears on the left side then vanishes as she smiles at the camera. [72-74] She shifts her gaze downward and tilts the small glass bowl, pouring the pale yellow liquid mixture into the larger bowl containing the white flour mixture.

[74-76] A close-up view captures a stream of pale yellow liquid pouring from a small glass bowl into a larger clear glass vessel filled with white flour resting on a speckled granite surface.
[76-80] A metal whisk is lowered into the bowl as white text "MIX TOGETHER" appears in the upper left corner. The utensil stirs the combined ingredients, blending the liquid and flour into a lumpy, yellowish batter on the countertop.
[80-82] A hand uses the metal whisk to mix the white flour and pale yellow liquid. The text "MIX TOGETHER" remains visible before vanishing as the whisking continues to blend the ingredients thoroughly.
[82-84] A hand vigorously whisks the mixture, transforming the lumpy batter into a smooth, consistent pale yellow liquid. A second hand, adorned with a gold bracelet, holds the side of the bowl steady on the granite surface.

[84-88] A metal whisk stirs a smooth, pale yellow batter inside a clear glass bowl, lifting to reveal a thick, viscous ribbon flowing from the wires. [88-96] A hand pours coarse white flakes from a glass container into a shallow, round metal bowl on a speckled granite countertop. As the white pile accumulates in the silver dish, the text "PANKO BREAD CRUMBS" appears and stays at the bottom of the screen in white capital letters with a black outline while the pouring action continues steadily.

recent_thinks: [24-26] A large glass bowl filled with coarse white flakes appears, overlaid with the text "PANKO BREAD CRUMBS" in black capital letters. To the right, raw white onion rings and a whole peeled onion sit on a clear plate, while a small bowl of white powder remains visible on the left edge.

[26-28] The scene shifts to a top-down view of multiple glass bowls containing eggs, milk, and white powders arranged on a counter. Text reading 'ALL-PURPOSE FLOUR' overlays a bowl of fine white powder while a finger points directly at it, identifying the ingredient within the preparation setup.

[96-98] A hand finishes pouring coarse white flakes from a clear glass bowl into a shallow metal bowl on a speckled countertop. The text "PANKO BREAD CRUMBS" stays at the bottom as the white pile grows larger inside the silver dish, completing the transfer of ingredients.

[98-100] A hand finishes pouring coarse white flakes from a clear glass bowl into a shallow metal dish on a speckled granite countertop. The text "PANKO BREAD CRUMBS" remains visible at the bottom in white capital letters with a black outline as the large mound of crumbs settles inside the silver container.

[100-102] Hands manipulate thick slices of white onion on a white cutting board surface. The person separates the concentric layers to form individual rings, pushing the center piece out. A gold bracelet adorns the right wrist while other white onion rings rest on the board nearby. The solid center slice is held up briefly.

queries.question: What text overlay is displayed in the top left corner during the presentation of the finished fried onion rings? A. PANKO BREAD CRUMBS B. ALL-PURPOSE FLOUR C. ONION RINGS D. VEGETABLE OIL

answers.text: C

samples.output: <think>Hands separate thick slices of white onion into individual rings on a white surface. The person pushes the inner layers out to form rings, with several separated pieces resting below. A gold bracelet is visible on the right wrist as the hands manipulate the vegetable.</think><answer></answer>

compressed_segments.text: [0-2] A metal gas burner beneath a pot ignites, spreading blue flames around the perforated head. [2-6] In a pot of bubbling yellow oil, three breaded rings fry before wooden chopsticks lower a fourth white, breadcrumb-coated ring into the liquid. [6-8] Golden-brown, crispy fried rings are arranged on a white rectangular platter lined with a paper towel. [8-14] A woman with dark hair tied back, wearing a yellow floral blouse and silver necklace, stands before a white door and window blinds, speaking directly to the camera with varying facial expressions. [14-16] A white rectangular plate displays a pile of golden-brown fried onion rings on a bamboo mat, positioned above two small square bowls containing red ketchup and pale yellow dipping sauce, with the text "ONION RINGS" in the upper left corner. [16-18] The text overlay changes to "RINGS" before the scene cuts to a woman in a yellow floral blouse standing behind a speckled countertop arranged with glass bowls of white powder, eggs, raw onion rings, and a container of yellow oil. [18-22] The woman speaks while resting her hands on the counter edge, then extends her left hand to gesture towards the bowl of yellow oil on the right

[74-76] A close-up view captures a stream of pale yellow liquid pouring from a small glass bowl into a larger clear glass vessel filled with white flour resting on a speckled granite surface.
[76-80] A metal whisk is lowered into the bowl as white text "MIX TOGETHER" appears in the upper left corner. The utensil stirs the combined ingredients, blending the liquid and flour into a lumpy, yellowish batter on the countertop.
[80-82] A hand uses the metal whisk to mix the white flour and pale yellow liquid. The text "MIX TOGETHER" remains visible before vanishing as the whisking continues to blend the ingredients thoroughly.
[82-84] A hand vigorously whisks the mixture, transforming the lumpy batter into a smooth, consistent pale yellow liquid. A second hand, adorned with a gold bracelet, holds the side of the bowl steady on the granite surface.

[84-88] A metal whisk stirs a smooth, pale yellow batter inside a clear glass bowl, lifting to reveal a thick, viscous ribbon flowing from the wires. [88-96] A hand pours coarse white flakes from a glass container into a shallow, round metal bowl on a speckled granite countertop. As the white pile accumulates in the silver dish, the text "PANKO BREAD CRUMBS" appears and stays at the bottom of the screen in white capital letters with a black outline while the pouring action continues steadily.

[96-100] A hand pours coarse white flakes from a clear glass bowl into a shallow metal dish on a speckled granite countertop. The text "PANKO BREAD CRUMBS" remains visible at the bottom as the large mound of crumbs settles inside the silver container. [100-104] Hands then manipulate thick slices of white onion on a white cutting board surface. The person separates the concentric layers to form individual rings, pushing the center piece out. A gold bracelet adorns the right wrist while other white onion rings rest on the board nearby, and the solid center slice is held up briefly during the process.

[104-108] Hands wearing a gold bracelet separate thick white onion slices into individual rings on a white plate, lifting one to display the hollow center. [108-110] The plate fills with separated rings while text "1/2 inch SLICES" appears in the corner. [110-114] A woman in a yellow floral top stands behind a counter arranged with the onion rings, a glass bowl of yellow batter, a bowl of breadcrumbs, and an empty metal tray. Text "PLACE ONION RINGS IN BATTER" is displayed. She holds a raw ring in a gloved hand, smiles, then lowers it into the batter as the text updates to "IN BATTER". Close-ups show the gloved hand submerging the ring completely into the thick yellow liquid mixture.

recent_thinks: [24-26] A large glass bowl filled with coarse white flakes appears, overlaid with the text "PANKO BREAD CRUMBS" in black capital letters. To the right, raw white onion rings and a whole peeled onion sit on a clear plate, while a small bowl of white powder remains visible on the left edge.

[26-28] The scene shifts to a top-down view of multiple glass bowls containing eggs, milk, and white powders arranged on a counter. Text reading 'ALL-PURPOSE FLOUR' overlays a bowl of fine white powder while a finger points directly at it, identifying the ingredient within the preparation setup.

[114-116] A woman in a yellow floral shirt lowers a white onion ring into a glass bowl of yellow batter. The scene cuts to a close-up where a gloved hand lifts the ring, now fully coated in the thick, pale mixture, dripping slightly as it is raised above the liquid surface.

[116-118] A gloved hand lifts a thick, yellow batter-coated onion ring from a clear glass bowl. The hand moves the ring over to a shallow metal pan filled with coarse white breadcrumbs and gently places it into the center of the dry mixture.

[118-120] A gloved hand places a batter-coated onion ring into a shallow metal pan filled with coarse white breadcrumbs. The hand then scoops the dry crumbs over the wet ring, actively covering its yellow surface with the textured white coating.

[120-122] A gloved hand actively scoops coarse white breadcrumbs over a batter-coated onion ring resting in a shallow metal pan. The hand presses the dry crumbs onto the wet yellow surface, ensuring the ring is thoroughly covered in the textured white coating. The ring becomes fully encased in the breading.

[122-124] A gloved hand presses coarse white breadcrumbs onto a batter-coated onion ring resting in a shallow metal pan, ensuring the yellow surface is completely covered. The hand then lifts the fully breaded ring, displaying its thick, textured white coating as it is raised from the dry mixture within the silver dish.

queries.question: What text overlay is displayed in the top left corner during the presentation of the finished fried onion rings? A. PANKO BREAD CRUMBS B. ALL-PURPOSE FLOUR C. ONION RINGS D. VEGETABLE OIL

answers.text: C

compressed_segments.text: [0-2] A metal gas burner beneath a pot ignites, spreading blue flames around the perforated head. [2-6] In a pot of bubbling yellow oil, three breaded rings fry before wooden chopsticks lower a fourth white, breadcrumb-coated ring into the liquid. [6-8] Golden-brown, crispy fried rings are arranged on a white rectangular platter lined with a paper towel. [8-14] A woman with dark hair tied back, wearing a yellow floral blouse and silver necklace, stands before a white door and window blinds, speaking directly to the camera with varying facial expressions. [14-16] A white rectangular plate displays a pile of golden-brown fried onion rings on a bamboo mat, positioned above two small square bowls containing red ketchup and pale yellow dipping sauce, with the text "ONION RINGS" in the upper left corner. [16-18] The text overlay changes to "RINGS" before the scene cuts to a woman in a yellow floral blouse standing behind a speckled countertop arranged with glass bowls of white powder, eggs, raw onion rings, and a container of yellow oil. [18-22] The woman speaks while resting her hands on the counter edge, then extends her left hand to gesture towards the bowl of yellow oil on the right

[104-108] Hands wearing a gold bracelet separate thick white onion slices into individual rings on a white plate, lifting one to display the hollow center. [108-110] The plate fills with separated rings while text "1/2 inch SLICES" appears in the corner. [110-114] A woman in a yellow floral top stands behind a counter arranged with the onion rings, a glass bowl of yellow batter, a bowl of breadcrumbs, and an empty metal tray. Text "PLACE ONION RINGS IN BATTER" is displayed. She holds a raw ring in a gloved hand, smiles, then lowers it into the batter as the text updates to "IN BATTER". Close-ups show the gloved hand submerging the ring completely into the thick yellow liquid mixture.

[114-116] A woman in a yellow floral shirt lowers a white onion ring into a glass bowl of yellow batter, after which a gloved hand lifts the fully coated ring. [116-120] The hand transfers the dripping ring to a shallow metal pan filled with coarse white breadcrumbs and scoops the dry mixture over the wet surface. [120-126] The gloved hand presses the crumbs firmly to cover the yellow batter completely, then lifts the textured, white-coated ring from the pan.

[126-130] A gloved hand presses coarse white breadcrumbs onto a batter-coated onion ring resting in a shallow metal pan. The hand ensures the yellow surface is completely covered with the textured white coating before lifting the ring slightly. The hand then transfers the fully coated onion ring to a clean, shallow metal tray, setting it down on the shiny silver surface next to other prepared rings. [130-132] A third breaded onion ring is placed onto the tray alongside two others, leaving three coated rings resting on the silver surface. [132-136] The scene shifts to a woman in a yellow floral top and clear gloves standing at a counter. She holds a batter-coated onion ring over a metal bowl filled with coarse white breadcrumbs, using her fingers to press the crumbs onto the battered surface. To her right, a metal tray holds several already breaded rings, while a plate of raw rings and a bowl of batter sit to her left.

[136-138] A woman in a yellow floral shirt completes coating an onion ring with breadcrumbs in a metal bowl and moves it to a silver tray. [138-142] The view transitions to a close-up of a metal gas stove burner igniting, where blue flames spread around the perforated burner head beneath a pot. [142-146] The woman stands next to the stove holding a small glass bowl of yellow liquid as text overlays read "ON MEDIUM-HIGH HEAT ADD VEGETABLE OIL" and then "VEGETABLE OIL". [146-148] She tilts the bowl to pour the vegetable oil into a metal pan on the burner.

recent_thinks: [24-26] A large glass bowl filled with coarse white flakes appears, overlaid with the text "PANKO BREAD CRUMBS" in black capital letters. To the right, raw white onion rings and a whole peeled onion sit on a clear plate, while a small bowl of white powder remains visible on the left edge.

[26-28] The scene shifts to a top-down view of multiple glass bowls containing eggs, milk, and white powders arranged on a counter. Text reading 'ALL-PURPOSE FLOUR' overlays a bowl of fine white powder while a finger points directly at it, identifying the ingredient within the preparation setup.

[148-150] The woman in the yellow floral top tilts the small glass bowl further, pouring a steady stream of yellow vegetable oil into the metal pan on the stove. She watches the oil fill the pan while holding the bowl with her right hand. The text overlay is no longer visible.

queries.question: What text overlay is displayed in the top left corner during the presentation of the finished fried onion rings? A. PANKO BREAD CRUMBS B. ALL-PURPOSE FLOUR C. ONION RINGS D. VEGETABLE OIL

answers.text: C

input.system:
You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).
